parameters.query:
INSERT INTO action_center.tasks (
  title,
  description,
  task_type,
  source,
  priority,
  dedupe_key,
  status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.taskTitle }}',
  '{{ $json.taskDescription.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  'review',
  'ai',
  'normal',
  '{{ $json.dedupeKey }}',
  'open'
)
ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL
DO UPDATE SET
  description = EXCLUDED.description,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id, title, created_at;

INSERT INTO action_center.tasks (
  title,
  description,
  source,
  priority,
  due_date,
  ai_confidence,
  ai_suggested_at,
  dedupe_key,
  status
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.title }}',
  '{{ ($json.description || "").replace(/'/g, "''") }}{{ $json.reasoning ? "\n\n_AI Reasoning: " + $json.reasoning.replace(/'/g, "''") + "_" : "" }}',
  'ai',
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  {{ $json.dueDate ? "'" + $json.dueDate + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.aiConfidence !== null ? $json.aiConfidence : 'NULL' }},
  NOW(),
  '{{ $json.dedupeKey }}',
  'open'
)
ON CONFLICT (dedupe_key) WHERE dedupe_key IS NOT NULL
DO NOTHING
RETURNING id, title;
